class.name: m1_hardware/M1SystemInterface
class.description: ros2_control SystemInterface for the M1 robot's Damiao (DM) CAN motors (dual OpenArm arms + shared prismatic lift). MIT-mode SocketCAN control; per-joint CAN id / master id / motor model / gains read from the URDF ros2_control parameters. Loads without a CAN bus present (mock I/O).
